sections.headline: Don't type, just speak
sections.subheadline: The voice-to-text AI that turns speech into clear, polished writing in every app.

animation.description: Side-by-side animated demo showing text appearing slowly via keyboard vs instantly via voice. Keyboard animation shows character-by-character typing with realistic delays. Voice side shows text flowing in sentence chunks with smooth fade-in.

sections.headline: 4x faster than typing
sections.body: After 150 years of using the same keyboard, voice that actually works is finally here. When you create, code, and respond faster, you free up time for more. Speak naturally at the speed you think and let Flow handle the rest.

animation.description: Two parallel progress bars with real-time WPM counters. Left side (keyboard) fills slowly at 45 WPM pace. Right side (Flow) fills rapidly at 220 WPM.

sections.headline: Used by professionals everywhere to speed up their thoughts
Write faster in all your apps, on any device
sections.subheadline: Seamless speech-to-text in every application on your iPhone or computer.

animation.description: App icons arranged in a 3D floating grid with subtle parallax effect. Icons gently bob up and down at different rates.

sections.headline: On-the-go or at your desk
sections.description: Flow works seamlessly across all your devices

segments.label: Teams
segments.hook: Fewer meetings, faster alignment, and a voice for everyone when it matters most.

segments.label: Students
segments.hook: Blank pages and looming deadlines? Flow's got you. Capture class notes, draft cover letters, and break through writer's block with minimal effort.

segments.label: Developers
segments.hook: Dictate in natural language and let Flow translate—perfect for Cursor, VS Code, or wherever you build.

segments.label: Creators
segments.hook: Ideas hit fast, but execution is slow. Breeze through unread DMs, comment replies, and draft content with your voice.

segments.label: Sales
segments.hook: Slow follow ups mean lost deals. With Flow, you can follow up instantly after meetings, personalize outreach, and punch up your pitch.

segments.label: Customer Support
segments.hook: Speak naturally to resolve tickets faster. Skip the script. Flow helps reps speak naturally while still sending perfect replies.

segments.label: Lawyers
segments.hook: Legal precision demands perfect transcription. Flow delivers smart dictation for contracts, case notes, and client records.

segments.label: Leaders
segments.hook: Who doesn't want faster teams and happier people? Flow delivers instant productivity your team will actually use.

segments.label: Accessibility
segments.hook: Your voice deserves a shortcut. Flow supports anyone who feels slowed down by a keyboard.

animation.description: Horizontal tab bar with pill-shaped active indicator that slides between tabs.

sections.headline: AI Auto Edits
sections.body: Speak naturally and Flow transcribes and edits your voice, instantly. Rambled thoughts become clear, perfectly formatted text, without the filler words or typos.

tabs.name: Speak

tabs.body: Flow works wherever you work. Any app, device, or language.

features.name: Speak into any app
features.description: Flow works everywhere: Notion, Gmail, Google Docs, WhatsApp, Cursor, anything with a text field.

features.description: Flow works in 100+ languages.

features.name: Whisper
features.description: Flow even works when you're whispering.

tabs.name: Refine
tabs.headline: Flow edits while you speak.
tabs.body: Flow goes beyond basic dictation: cleaning up filler words, formatting lists, catching punctuation, and understanding corrections in real time.
tabs.visual: ChatGPT-like UI mockup showing text editing

features.name: Backtrack
features.description: Flow understands when you change your mind. Say 'Let's meet at 2… actually 3,' and Flow writes the corrected version instantly.

features.name: Remove fillers
features.description: Flow automatically removes 'um,' 'uh,' and other pauses.

features.name: Numbered lists
features.description: Just speak the numbers and Flow turns it into a formatted list.

features.name: Auto punctuation
features.description: Flow detects punctuation naturally from your pauses and tone.

tabs.name: Personalize
tabs.headline: Flow adapts to you.
tabs.body: Flow learns your words, phrases, and tone, and keeps them consistent across every app and device.
tabs.visual: Slack-like UI mockup showing tone adaptation

faq.q: How do I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faq.a: You can upgrade directly from the app settings or website.

faq.q: Is there a free trial or free plan available?
faq.a: Yes, 14 days of Flow Pro free, plus a forever-free Basic plan.

faq.q: Can I change or cancel my subscription at any time?
faq.a: Yes, cancel your subscription anytime with no penalties.

faq.q: Do you offer discounts for specific groups?
faq.a: Yes, students get 3 months free + 50% off. Contact us for non-profit and education discounts.

faq.q: Can I use Flow for my whole team?
faq.a: Yes, Flow Pro and Enterprise support team features with centralized billing.

hero_visual.background: Dark purple gradient with animated flowing line art/paths

about.mission: We are a team of designers, AI researchers, and engineers who step away from the status quo to rethink the fundamental layer of computing — how humans interact with technology.
about.vision: Our mission is to make interacting with your devices as effortless as talking to a close friend.
about.extended_copy: As we make tech more conversational, we create a world where people enjoy more clarity, connection, and agency — with less screen time, context-switching, and cognitive overload. Communicating and creating become easier, busywork disappears, and everyone has more time for what matters most. Our first product Flow, makes voice dictation delightful. We focus on the biggest use case for technology — letting people communicate with others, their thoughts, and AI. Over the last few months, Flow became the first consumer voice dictation platform that makes people want to use voice more than their keyboards. And we're just getting started.

items: We care about building intelligence that mimics humans.
We care about designing with incredible attention to detail.
We care about building experiences that feel intuitive.
We care about building software that seamlessly fits into your life.

founder_section.headline: From our founder
founder_section.subheadline: Hear how Tanay's childhood obsession with Jarvis led to building something that actually gets you.

careers_cta.subheadline: We're building Wispr with care — and we're growing. From engineering to design, we're always looking for thoughtful people to help shape what's next.

investors.description: We are fortunate to work with some of the best investors in the industry. Our backers include the top names and exceptional founders and product builders.

privacy.headline: Privacy first. Security always.
privacy.subheadline: We never sell or share your data. Privacy Mode ensures no dictation is stored on our servers, and Flow is independently certified to the world's top security standards: SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, and HIPAA.

trusted_by.headline: Trusted by teams who put security first

privacy_built_in.headline: Privacy built-in
privacy_built_in.description: With Privacy Mode enabled, zero dictation data is stored on our servers. To enable it, go to Settings > Data & Privacy > Privacy Mode.

auditing_section.headline: We put our security to the test with live, independent auditing.

certifications.name: SOC 2 Type II Compliance
certifications.description: Audited against rigorous best practices for security, availability, and confidentiality. Available to Enterprise plans only.

certifications.name: HIPAA Compliance
certifications.description: Built to protect sensitive health data. Available on all plans with the assistance of a Business Associate Agreement (BAA).

certifications.name: ISO 27001
certifications.description: International framework for managing and improving information security. Available to Enterprise plans only.

faq.q: Do you store my voice recordings or transcripts?
faq.a: With Privacy Mode on, no voice data is stored or used for training.

faq.q: What is Privacy Mode and how does it work?
faq.a: Privacy Mode ensures zero data retention - your dictation data isn't stored or used for model training.

faq.q: How can I enable HIPAA compliance?
faq.a: All plans are HIPAA-ready. Contact us for a BAA for your organization.

faq.q: What security certifications do you have?
faq.a: SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, and HIPAA compliance.

faq.q: Where is my data stored and how is it protected?
faq.a: Data is encrypted in transit and at rest with industry-standard encryption.

faq.q: Does Wispr Flow support Single Sign-On (SSO)?
faq.a: Yes, SSO/SAML is available on Enterprise plans.
